verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come, praise the Lord, all His servants come, praise the Lord, all His servants all the servants, who serve in the temple of the Lord,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: and raise your hands in prayer in the temple, and praise Him, praise Him, praise Him all His servants.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: May the Lord who made heaven and earth bless you from Zion, bless you from Zion. Praise the Lord, praise the Lord!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come, praise the Lord and worship Him! Come praise the Lord and exalt His name!
